overlap_notes: Distinct stool multi-omics row from DS001. ST001000/PRJNA400072 corresponds to Franzosa et al. Nature Microbiology 2019, PMID 30531976, DOI 10.1038/s41564-018-0306-4, with fecal LC-MS metabolomics plus paired shotgun metagenomics. Metabolomics Workbench verifies ST001000, Broad Institute, Homo sapiens, LC-MS, 220 samples; NCBI BioProject PRJNA400072 verifies paired shotgun metagenomes and LC-MS metabolomes from IBD and non-IBD controls with 220 SRA experiments. Count once as an independent study family; do not count ST001000 and PRJNA400072 separately. Keep separate from DS001 IBDMDB_iHMP_HMP2 because public accessions and publications differ: DS056 uses ST001000/PRJNA400072/PR000677 and PMID 30531976; DS001 uses GSE111889/phs001626.v1.p1/PRJNA398089 and PMID 31142855. Public sources do not provide subject-level crosswalk proving no shared individuals, so separation is based on distinct accession/publication/cohort metadata.
notes: Label is acceptable as a compact registry family label, but notes should preserve that the paper also includes LifeLines DEEP and NLIBD validation cohorts under the same DS056 source record.

overlap_notes: No required change. Existing DS001 notes already define it as the IBDMDB/iHMP/HMP2 parent row and list GSE111889, phs001626.v1.p1, and PRJNA398089. DS056 should be documented separately rather than added as a DS001 component.
notes: Optional only: append a short clarification that DS056/ST001000/PRJNA400072 is a separate PRISM/Broad stool multi-omics family, not a DS001 component.
